title: Add constellation connection lines between points
overview: Create a constellation line overlay system that composites connection lines over the active point-based geometry system. Lines connect nearby points within a bass-modulated proximity threshold, with distance-based opacity fade and GPU-budget-aware connection limits. Implemented as a companion layer that reads positions from any active GeometrySystem exposing a positions getter, rendered as THREE.LineSegments with depth fog and a custom ShaderMaterial for audio reactivity.

architecture_decisions.decision: Constellation lines as a companion overlay, not a standalone mode
architecture_decisions.rationale: The ticket says 'composited over any point-based geometry system'. Rather than registering as a ModeManager mode, the constellation layer is initialized alongside the active system and reads its positions. The ModeManager orchestrates which point system is active; the constellation layer hooks into mode switches to rebuild its line buffer from the new system's positions.

architecture_decisions.decision: CPU-side spatial proximity search with bounded connection count
architecture_decisions.rationale: Per the ticket notes, use CPU-side proximity search at mode init (not per-frame). A brute-force O(n²) neighbor search is acceptable given max point counts (≤2000 at high tier). Connection count is capped per-point (e.g. max 4-6 neighbors) and globally (e.g. max 3000 line segments at high tier) to bound GPU cost.

architecture_decisions.decision: THREE.LineSegments with custom ShaderMaterial for audio reactivity
architecture_decisions.rationale: LineSegments is the most efficient Three.js line primitive (pairs of vertices = independent segments). A custom ShaderMaterial allows bass-driven distance threshold modulation and treble-driven brightness/opacity in the fragment shader, plus depth fog consistent with existing systems.

Line connections are computed once at init from base positions (pre-GPU-deformation). Per-frame, only uniforms update (bass energy, treble energy, time, opacity). This avoids per-frame CPU geometry rebuilds. The GPU vertex shader applies the same warp as the point system to keep lines attached to their points.

files_to_create.purpose: Main constellation line overlay system implementing GeometrySystem interface. Contains proximity search, line buffer construction, ShaderMaterial setup, and per-frame uniform updates.

Vertex shader for constellation lines. Transforms line endpoints, applies the same noise-based warp as point systems (imports noise3d.glsl) so lines track deformed point positions. Passes distance-based alpha and depth to fragment shader.
Fragment shader for constellation lines. Applies distance-based opacity fade, treble-driven brightness modulation, and atmospheric depth fog matching existing systems.
Unit and integration tests for the constellation line system covering init, proximity search, connection bounds, audio reactivity, quality tier degradation, cleanup, and determinism.

files_to_modify.changes: Add enableConstellationLines (boolean) and maxConstellationSegments (number) to QualityProfile interface. Low tier: false/0. Medium tier: true/1500. High tier: true/3000.
Add CONSTELLATION_ATTRIBUTES array (position itemSize 3, aAlpha itemSize 1) and optionally CONSTELLATION_UNIFORMS if needed for validation.

Extend ModeManager to support an optional overlay layer. Add methods to attach/detach a constellation overlay that inits when the active mode inits and rebuilds on mode switch. The overlay receives the active system's positions and draws after the active mode.
Create constellation line overlay with quality-driven config, attach it to the mode manager as an overlay layer. Only create if quality.enableConstellationLines is true.

Add optional positions getter to GeometrySystem interface (positions?: Float32Array | null) so the constellation overlay can generically read positions from any active system. Alternatively, add a PositionProvider interface.

implementation_steps.title: Extend QualityProfile and types
implementation_steps.description: Add enableConstellationLines and maxConstellationSegments to QualityProfile in quality.ts. Add a PositionProvider interface or optional positions accessor to types.ts. Add CONSTELLATION_ATTRIBUTES to shaderRegistry.ts.

implementation_steps.title: Write constellation shaders
implementation_steps.description: Create constellation.vert.glsl that imports noise3d.glsl and applies the same warp transform as pointWarp.vert.glsl (radial expansion, noise displacement, twist, drift based on bass/time uniforms). Compute per-vertex alpha from the aAlpha attribute (pre-computed distance-based fade). Create constellation.frag.glsl with atmospheric depth fog (uFogNear/uFogFar), distance-based alpha, treble brightness modulation, and uOpacity support for crossfade transitions.

implementation_steps.title: Implement constellationLines system
implementation_steps.description: Create the core system: (1) Proximity search function that takes Float32Array positions and a distance threshold, returns pairs of indices within threshold, capped by maxSegments and max-neighbors-per-point. (2) Line buffer builder that creates a Float32Array of paired vertex positions and per-vertex alpha values (alpha = 1 - distance/threshold). (3) GeometrySystem implementation with init(scene, seed, params) that accepts positions via a setPositions() method, builds LineSegments geometry, and creates ShaderMaterial. (4) draw() updates uniforms: uBassEnergy (modulates effective threshold conceptually, but since topology is static, instead scales line alpha/visibility), uTrebleEnergy (brightness), uTime, uOpacity. (5) cleanup() disposes geometry and material.

implementation_steps.title: Write tests for constellation system
implementation_steps.description: Test proximity search correctness (points within threshold are connected, points outside are not). Test connection count bounds (per-point cap and global cap). Test determinism (same positions + threshold = same connections). Test init creates LineSegments mesh in scene. Test draw updates uniforms from frame state. Test cleanup removes mesh and disposes resources. Test graceful degradation (0 maxSegments = no mesh added). Test alpha values are in [0,1] and correlate with distance.

implementation_steps.title: Extend ModeManager with overlay support
implementation_steps.description: Add an attachOverlay(overlay, getPositions) method to ModeManager. During mode transitions: when a new mode finishes init, call overlay.setPositions() with the new system's positions and re-init the overlay. During draw, draw the overlay after the active system. Overlay opacity follows the active system's opacity during crossfades.

implementation_steps.title: Wire constellation overlay into main.ts
implementation_steps.description: In main.ts, after creating geometry systems: if quality.enableConstellationLines is true, create a constellation overlay with maxConstellationSegments from quality profile. Attach it to the mode manager. Ensure the overlay is cleaned up on context loss.

implementation_steps.title: Integration testing and quality gating validation
implementation_steps.description: Add tests verifying: low-tier devices get no constellation lines, medium/high tiers get appropriate segment caps. Test mode switch triggers constellation rebuild. Test that existing systems still pass all their tests (no regressions). Run full build to verify shader compilation.

constellation_config.bassModulation: Bass energy scales line alpha globally (high bass = more visible web, low bass = fading connections)
constellation_config.depthFog: Same uFogNear=3.0, uFogFar=8.0 as existing systems for visual consistency

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Line endpoints drift from deformed point positions since topology is computed from base positions
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Constellation vertex shader must apply the identical warp transform as the parent point system's vertex shader. Import the same noise3d.glsl and replicate the displacement logic with matching uniforms.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: O(n²) proximity search is slow for high point counts
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Max 2000 points → ~2M comparisons, which completes in <10ms on modern CPUs. Only runs at init, not per-frame. If needed later, spatial hashing can be added.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Too many line segments cause GPU performance issues
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Hard cap via maxConstellationSegments in QualityProfile. Per-point neighbor cap (5) provides a soft bound. Low-tier devices skip entirely.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Different geometry systems use different vertex shader warp transforms
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: The constellation vertex shader must support multiple warp modes or use a simplified common warp. Initial implementation targets the pointWarp transform; a uniform flag can switch warp profiles per system type if needed.

definition_of_done: No console errors or shader compilation errors on normal load
Constellation lines visible over point-based geometry systems on medium/high tier
Lines connect points within configurable proximity threshold
Connection distance threshold effect visible via bass energy modulation
Line opacity fades with distance between connected points
Connection count bounded — no GPU overload at max point counts
Lines render as THREE.LineSegments with depth fog
Low-tier devices: constellation lines disabled, no performance impact
Scene works with and without successful autoplay
Mute toggle and info overlay still work
New tests pass for constellation system
